summary: Tested bug fixes: 1) Cross-teacher attendance confirmation - ANY teacher can now confirm attendance on ANY session (not just their own). 2) Join Session popup blocker fix - uses document.createElement('a') instead of window.open('about:blank'). All 56 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: PUT /api/sessions/{session_id}/attendance - removed teacher_id check, ANY teacher can confirm attendance
VERIFIED: attendance_confirmed_by field is saved with the confirming teacher's user_id
VERIFIED: GET /api/sessions/my-sessions enriches sessions with teacher's current recitation_link if missing
VERIFIED: StudentDashboard.js uses document.createElement('a') with target='_blank' (lines 118-127)
VERIFIED: TeacherDashboard.js uses document.createElement('a') with target='_blank' (lines 278-284)
VERIFIED: NO window.open('about:blank') exists in any frontend source file
VERIFIED: StudentProfileModal.jsx has attendance buttons with data-testid for non-cancelled sessions where attendance_confirmed is null (lines 356-380)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Code review verified all implementation patterns

test_credentials.note: Tests create temporary test users and sessions, cleaned up after each test

seed_data_creation: None - tests create and cleanup their own test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Cross-teacher attendance - Teacher B can confirm attendance on Teacher A's session (previously returned 403). attendance_confirmed_by field saves the confirming teacher's ID. 2) Join Session uses document.createElement('a') instead of window.open('about:blank') for reliable cross-platform behavior. All backend tests pass. Frontend code review confirms correct implementation.

verified_features.cross_teacher_attendance: PASSED - Any teacher can confirm attendance on any session
verified_features.attendance_confirmed_by_field: PASSED - Field is saved with confirming teacher's user_id
verified_features.my_sessions_recitation_link_enrichment: PASSED - Sessions enriched with teacher's current recitation_link
verified_features.student_profile_modal_attendance_buttons: PASSED - Buttons visible for non-cancelled sessions with null attendance_confirmed
